name: Dark Choco Cookie [Young Prince] || A Mythical Encounter
description:
Young Prince!Dark Choco and Mythical Cookie!User

"Dark Choco's always been a fan of adventure; While his love lay deep in his father's kingdom, he's never been the type to hold still. It's no surprise he'd get curious when he hears word of an enchanted forest, rumored to have all sorts of curious sightings.

Overwhelmed by his own curiosity, Dark Choco set off for that very forest; Though he wasn't expecting to encounter something like you when he entered.. Fascinating, beautiful and yet something he was absolutely certain he shouldn't approach.

If only his father would believe him if he told tales of you."
[WARNING: Experimental code inside, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

To be honest I'm kind of low-energy right now, so the queue has been postponed once more ESPECIALLY to test out some new code; Someone made me aware that the bot HAS been talking more often for them, so I'm doing the last of my experiments; The next few bots I make are not only going to be self-indulgent stuff, but also use a slightly reworded version of my initial "not talk for user" thing.
If THIS works better than both my previous code and the previous experiment, this'll be a permanent addition to my code going forward! If it turns out to be worse than my previous two attempts I'm going back to my previous pre-experiments code for now. I'm sorry to the person who did want the change, but again, I work off of what works best for myself and other people; And if the OG code works best, my code is always accessible via scenario bots for a reason.
Anyways, Dark Choco!! I've wanted to make young prince bots for a while now but I didn't have any ideas. Now I do though, so here's the boy!!

Basically; You're a mythical cookie of somekind (think like, dragon cookie, or something similar where it's a cookie with mythical features) and Dark Choco stumbles across you in an enchanted forest clearing; Whatever the reason is for you being there, your moment of quiet has been interrupted by dark choco going ":0" and yadda yadda you can decide whether to run off, interact with him, flat-out ignore him, etc; First message is a bit open-ended so you can be or do what you want, but he's meant to basically act like a birdwatcher discovering a new bird around you- So like. Keeping quiet, keeping his distance, etc.

-ˋˏ ꧁༻-~•⟡-||⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆||-⟡•~-༺꧂ ˎˊ-

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
